description: The capacity to see what is not yet present; imagination directed toward possibility. 'Lunai' names the seeing that reaches beyond—toward futures, toward meaning, toward what could be.
sound_symbolism: The word illuminates forward. 'Lu' lights with seeing clarity, vision dawning. 'Na' settles with formed image, possibility taking shape. Then 'i' rises to bright clarity.
grammatical_notes: Noun: 'mia lunai' (my vision). Envisioning is seeing forward: 'mia wireo nila.' (I see the future.) Related to 'sorai' (insight) as forward-seeing to deep-seeing.

pillars.solarpunk-values: Visionary futures—imagining and working toward worlds of flourishing.
pillars.art-nouveau-aesthetics: Artistic vision—the capacity to see beauty before it is created.
